metadata.description: Actian Design System 2026 toolkit for Figma-to-code workflows, component briefs, design audits, and wireframe generation.

plugins.name: actian-design-system
plugins.description: Actian Design System 2026 toolkit — generate wireframe flows, create 9-card component briefs, audit Figma files, and compare flows. Includes DS2026 tokens (3 themes), content guidelines, accessibility standards (WCAG 2.1 AA), and 42 Fat Marker wireframe components.
